scripts.db:dev: npm run db:destroy && docker compose --env-file .env.development up
scripts.postinstall: npm run server:install && npm run client:install
scripts.dev: concurrently 'npm run db:dev' 'npm run server:dev' 'npm run client:dev'
scripts.start: npm run client:build && concurrently 'npm run db:start' 'npm run server:start'
